name: Tenant's Commitment to Vacate (Eviction Waiver)
description: A binding agreement where a tenant unconditionally commits to vacating the leased premises by a specific date, acknowledging potential legal consequences for failure to do so.
content:
COMMITMENT AND AGREEMENT TO VACATE PREMISES

TENANT: {{tenant_name}}
ID / SSN: {{tenant_id}}
LANDLORD: {{landlord_name}}
PROPERTY ADDRESS: {{property_address}}
ORIGINAL LEASE DATE: {{formatDate lease_date}}
AGREED VACATE DATE: {{formatDate vacate_date}}

I, the undersigned Tenant, currently occupying the Property Address stated above, hereby unconditionally declare, agree, and commit to vacating the premises on or before the Agreed Vacate Date specified above. I will surrender the premises to the Landlord completely vacant of my personal property and in good, broom-clean condition without the need for any further notice or formal demand from the Landlord.

I fully acknowledge and agree that if I fail to vacate the premises by the Agreed Vacate Date, the Landlord shall have the immediate right to commence formal eviction proceedings against me. Furthermore, I agree that I shall be held fully liable for all court costs, eviction fees, attorney's fees, and any loss of rental income incurred by the Landlord as a direct result of my failure to vacate the premises as promised.

Date of Commitment: {{formatDate commitment_date}}

Tenant's Signature

{{tenant_name}}


Signature: _________________________

fields.name: property_address
fields.label: Address of Premises to be Vacated
